subcodes.first_line: O ye who are ablaze with the fire of the Covenant! In this ailing earthly realm, no relief or repose can be imagined [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مشتعلان بنار میثاق در این اقلیم سقیم ترابی گشایش و آسایش تصور نتوان نمود
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow, @material and spiritual existence; two books, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
